error_signature: scroll function not working in modal on data overflow
title: Scroll function not working in modal with data overflow
symptom: Users are unable to scroll within a modal when there is an overflow of data, leading to content being inaccessible.
not_this_if: Height is set to a fixed value that accommodates all content
root_cause: The new modal implementation may have different default settings for height, which can cause the content div to expand beyond the visible area without a scrollbar appearing. This is often due to the height being set to 'auto' instead of a fixed value.
fix_steps: Change the height from 'auto' to 'fixed' or set it to '100vh'.
Alternatively, use a calculation like 'calc(100vh - 240px)' to adjust the height dynamically.
agent_instruction: Adjust the modal height settings to ensure a scrollbar appears for overflowing content.
